nodes.label: AI as conversational collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I have a very conversational tone with my AI so it becomes very collaborative

nodes.label: AI as emotional support and encouragement
nodes.label_negative: AI as purely functional without emotional support
nodes.grounding_span: I appreciate the encouragement it gives me

nodes.label: AI as iterative co-creator for better outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: iterative work and multi-turn conversations always yield better results

nodes.label: AI as thinking partner for complex decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or unhelpful for complex decisions
nodes.grounding_span: having the ability to talk through all the options

nodes.label: AI as enhancer of human creativity and productivity
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human creativity and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: AI will only enhance my skills not replace them

nodes.label: AI with personal feel and empathy
nodes.label_negative: AI as robotic task solver without empathy
nodes.grounding_span: a desire for AI that has that personal feel to it, not just a robotic task solver, but a conversationalist with empathy

nodes.label: AI in creative tasks requiring human intuition
nodes.label_negative: AI fully taking over creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: when it comes to creative tasks, especially brainstorming, and creative writing, I do prefer to do those myself

nodes.label: AI stigma in creative industry
nodes.label_negative: Open acceptance of AI in creative industry
nodes.grounding_span: there is this sense of almost shame in using AI

nodes.label: Collaborative synergy and better outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: working collaboratively with it makes for much better work

nodes.label: Emotional well-being and productivity support
nodes.grounding_span: it helps to keep me on track

nodes.label: Human autonomy and creative control
nodes.grounding_span: the more I care about a project, the more I want to be involved in the bulk of the creative work

nodes.label: Humanity and empathy in AI interactions
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to feel I'm not losing my humanity by interacting with AI

nodes.label: Positive toward conversational collaborative AI
nodes.grounding_span: I have a very conversational tone with my AI so it becomes very collaborative

nodes.label: Positive toward AI enhancing skills

nodes.label: Negative toward AI stigma

nodes.label: Conversational and relational reasoning — treats AI as a person to foster collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I treat my AI a bit like a person really
